sidebar.kritDenkenSidebar.category.Liste.message: List of the Best-Known Formal Fallacies
sidebar.kritDenkenSidebar.category.Liste.description: The label for category 'Liste der bekanntesten formellen Fehlschlüsse' in sidebar 'kritDenkenSidebar'

sidebar.kritDenkenSidebar.category.Liste.message: Here is a list of the best-known formal fallacies. These fallacies arise from errors in the logical structure of an argument, independently of its content. They lead to invalid conclusions even when the premises are true. They can be divided into three groups: logical fallacies, probabilistic fallacies, and fallacies in classical syllogisms.
sidebar.kritDenkenSidebar.category.Liste.description: The generated-index page description for category 'Liste der bekanntesten formellen Fehlschlüsse' in sidebar 'kritDenkenSidebar'

sidebar.kritDenkenSidebar.category.Liste.message: List of the Best-Known Informal Fallacies
